features: 🌸【 PACKAGE INCLUDED】6 Pack round plastic tablecloth has a size of 84". Tablecloths are the most efficient and effective way to create an attractive table setting, making them an essential part of any special occasion such as weddings, birthdays and more

🌸【 EASY TO CLEAN 】 The clean-up process after your party is really quick and simple when you use disposable tablecloths. After usage, just wrap up the plastic tablecloth before throwing it away and dispose
